violations.text: Various foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

Packaged Raw animal foods (Beef and Bacon) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the Open Air Cooler in the retail area. Raw animal foods must be stored below Ready-to-Eat food items. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
